MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-18-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem William Gargano, Clerk Ron Ross, Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Eva Brzeski, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Saraha Buddist Center.
Attorney, Ross McLauran Madden representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Joan Woodward is present.
Attornies Michael Dell and Kareem Ghanem representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was not filed.

This case settled, the trial date of 2/23/09 is vacated.
